series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of, but is not limited to, complaints received by the Division, Division correspondence, mediation agreements, accommodation agreements or any other records produced as a result of a complaint resolved through the Division''s mediation process affecting appraisers, real estate licensees, appraisal management companies, manufactured home program and home inspectors. These records will contain confidential information pursuant to Ohio Revised Code Sections 2710.03 & 2710.07.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Records maintained in paper form shall be maintained one year from date of fulfillment of accommodation agreement or date notice was sent parties indicating mediation was unsuccessful and complaint will be forwarded investigation section. ; Electronic: any records maintained in machine readable format, records shall be maintained one year from date of fulfillment of accommodation agreement or date notice was sent parties indicating mediation was unsuccessful and complaint will be forwarded investigation section. ; Microform: any records maintained in microform, records shall be maintained one year from date of fulfillment of accommodation agreement or date notice was sent parties indicating mediation was unsuccessful and complaint will be forwarded investigation section
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Shred
